title: 【繼續做國際笑話】 加拿大向香港發出旅遊警示

replies.msg:
今次到加拿大


https://travel.gc.ca/destinations/hong-kong?fbclid=IwAR1nvPsxE5nupn87k-4GH76YXRfxVOXXO0yh8xznsciUpYyl-ikXLlPTQQA#security

Several large scale political demonstrations have taken place since June 9, 2019, on Hong Kong Island (in the areas of Admiralty, Tamar Park, Victoria Park and the Central Government Complex), in Kowloon and in various suburbs in the New Territories. These demonstrations, which can take place on short notice, may continue and are likely to cause traffic and transportation disruptions in affected areas. Acts of violence have occurred, including clashes between security forces and demonstrators. Some have resulted in serious injuries.
